name: EAA Blend
summary: Evidence depends on blend composition, leucine dose, protein intake, age, and training status; no formulation-independent authority citation selected.
description: EAA blend effects depend on exact amino-acid ratios, leucine content, protein background, and training state; evidence is formulation- and context-dependent.
safetyNotes: Generally tolerated; caution advanced kidney disease and amino acid metabolism disorders.
